channel.title: Scrollback
channel.description: Local screen memory and search app for macOS

item.title: Version 2.0.0
item.description:
v2.0.0 — Scrollback rename + SwiftUI modernization

Major release: this fork is now called Scrollback with its own bundle ID, update channel, and signing keys. It is no longer tied to the upstream TimeScroll project.

Breaking changes

  • App renamed TimeScroll → Scrollback. Bundle ID is now com.parrotcycles.scrollback.
  • You will need to re-grant Screen Recording and Accessibility permissions after updating (macOS ties these to bundle ID).
  • macOS 14.0+ now required (was 13.0).
  • Dock icon is now hidden when no window is open — app lives in the menu bar. Toggle in Settings → General if you prefer always-on Dock.

Under the hood

  • Migrated 7 model classes to Swift's @Observable macro.
  • Converted ~32 DispatchQueue hops to structured concurrency (Task / MainActor.run).
  • Modernized ~100 deprecated SwiftUI calls (foregroundColor, cornerRadius, onChange).
  • Added accessibility labels to 15+ icon-only buttons.

Existing snapshots and database are preserved; the storage folder name is intentionally unchanged for data continuity.
